name: clawfeed
description: ClawFeed — AI-powered news digest with structured summaries from Twitter/RSS feeds and web dashboard
readme_summary: ClawFeed is an AI-powered news digest service that aggregates content from various sources like Twitter and RSS feeds. It provides structured summaries at different frequencies and features a web dashboard for management and analysis, with options for standalone use or integration as a skill within other platforms.
key_features: Multi-frequency digests (4-hourly, daily, weekly, monthly)
Supports various sources: Twitter, RSS, HackerNews, Reddit, GitHub Trending
Source Packs for sharing curated source bundles
Content bookmarking for AI-powered deep analysis
Configurable rules for content filtering and noise reduction
Follow/Unfollow suggestions based on feed quality
RSS and JSON Feed output for digests
Multi-language support (English, Chinese)
Dark/Light mode theme toggle
Web dashboard (SPA) for browsing and management
SQLite for storage
Google OAuth for multi-user support
primary_use_case: To provide users with concise, AI-generated summaries of news and information from a wide range of online sources, reducing information overload.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, stylized owl perched on a stack of digital scrolls, with glowing data streams flowing from various social media icons (Twitter bird, RSS feed symbol) and news icons into the owl's eyes. The owl is transforming these streams into neatly organized, illuminated summary cards that float gently downwards. In the background, a subtle, clean web dashboard interface is visible, showing organized digest categories. The overall mood is intelligent and calm, with a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing gold accents, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: escrcpy
description: 📱 Display and control your Android device graphically with scrcpy.
readme_summary: Escrcpy is a JavaScript-based application that provides graphical display and control of Android devices on a desktop. It leverages the scrcpy core for high-performance mirroring and integrates features like natural-language commands, multi-device management, and wireless connectivity.
key_features: Intelligent Control with natural-language commands
Automation and parallel operations across multiple devices
Multi-device visual window orchestration
Wireless connections with Gnirehtet reverse tethering
High-performance, low-latency screen mirroring based on Scrcpy
primary_use_case: Displaying and controlling Android devices graphically on a desktop, enabling automation and multi-device management.
cover_image_prompt: A conductor orchestrating a symphony of smartphones. Each phone, held by a digital hand, displays a different app or screen, all synchronized and controlled from a central console resembling a futuristic music stand. The conductor, a stylized figure with glowing data streams emanating from their fingertips, directs the flow of information. Subtle UI elements of escrcpy are visible on the console, showing device status and command inputs. The background is a clean, abstract digital space with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing the harmony and control. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, glowing accents.

name: YTSage
description: Modern YouTube downloader with a clean PySide6 interface. Download videos in any quality, extract audio, fetch subtitles, sponsorBlock, and view video metadata. Built with yt-dlp for reliable performance.
readme_summary: YTSage is a modern, user-friendly YouTube downloader application built with PySide6. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to provide a clean graphical interface for downloading videos in various qualities, extracting audio, fetching subtitles, and integrating with SponsorBlock.
key_features: Clean PySide6 interface
Download videos in any quality
Extract audio
Fetch subtitles
SponsorBlock integration
Playlist support
Auto-update yt-dlp
Cross-platform support
primary_use_case: Downloading YouTube videos and audio through a graphical user interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot assistant holding a large, ornate key, unlocking a treasure chest overflowing with digital video files and audio waveforms. The robot is standing in front of a stylized YouTube logo, with subtle UI elements and progress bars integrated into the background. One hand of the robot is pointing towards a download arrow icon. The scene should be bright and inviting, using a clean, modern flat design style with vibrant colors, emphasizing ease of use and accessibility. The repository name 'YTSage' is subtly etched onto the robot's chassis.

name: theHarvester
description: E-mails, subdomains and names Harvester - OSINT
readme_summary: theHarvester is a Python-based OSINT tool designed for the reconnaissance phase of security assessments. It efficiently gathers emails, subdomains, hostnames, and other external information related to a domain by querying numerous public data sources.
key_features: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) gathering
Reconnaissance for red team assessments and penetration tests
Gathers names, emails, IPs, subdomains, and URLs
Utilizes multiple public resources and passive modules
Supports Python 3.12+
Includes development tools for testing and linting
primary_use_case: Gathering open-source intelligence (OSINT) for domain reconnaissance during security assessments.
cover_image_prompt: A digital detective, wearing a trench coat adorned with subtle circuit patterns, stands before a vast, glowing world map representing the internet. The detective holds a magnifying glass that, when focused on a specific domain icon, reveals a cascade of interconnected data points: email addresses, subdomains, and hostnames, visualized as glowing threads. Small, transparent screens float around the detective, displaying snippets of theHarvester's module names and successful data retrieval. The background is a dark, futuristic cityscape with subtle binary code rain. The overall mood is one of focused investigation and discovery. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a dark, high-tech color palette and glowing data elements.

name: ru-test-assignments
description: Тестовые задания для самостоятельного выполнения от разных it компаний
readme_summary: This repository serves as a curated collection of technical assignments from various IT companies, primarily aimed at helping individuals practice and improve their analytical and data-related skills. It organizes these assignments by company and role, providing links to the specific tasks and sometimes indicating the required technologies.
key_features: Collection of technical assignments from IT companies
Organized by company and role (e.g., Analyst, Product Analyst)
Includes links to specific assignment details
Indicates required technologies (e.g., Python, SQL)
Aims to help users practice and build a portfolio
primary_use_case: To provide a centralized resource for individuals to find and complete technical assignments from various IT companies for skill development and portfolio building.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing a vast library filled with books, each book representing a technical assignment from a different IT company. The librarian is carefully placing a book labeled 'Amazon Data Analyst' onto a shelf, while another shelf displays books like 'Aviasales Product Analyst' and 'Kaspi SQL Analyst'. Subtle glowing data streams flow from the books, indicating the skills learned. The library is warm and inviting, with soft lighting. In the background, a small, elegant screen displays the repository name 'ru-test-assignments'. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, organized aesthetic and a palette of warm browns, golds, and soft blues.

name: octofriend
description: An open-source coding helper. Very friendly!
readme_summary: Octo is an open-source, privacy-focused coding assistant that integrates with various LLM APIs. It offers features like automatic tool call and code edit handling, optional web search, and sandboxing via Docker, aiming to be a friendly and helpful coding companion.
key_features: Open-source coding assistant
Supports OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible LLM APIs
Supports switching models mid-conversation
Optional custom-trained autofix models for tool call and code edit failures
Zero telemetry and privacy-focused
Optional web search with Synthetic API or custom configuration
Docker support for sandboxing and running within containers
Supports custom instructions via OCTO.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md files
primary_use_case: To act as a friendly, privacy-conscious AI coding assistant that helps developers with various coding tasks, integrates with multiple LLMs, and provides advanced features like sandboxing and automated error correction.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic octopus character, subtly stylized with subtle digital circuits, acting as a helpful guide for a human developer. The octopus is holding a glowing, intricate key that unlocks a complex, abstract digital lockbox labeled 'Code'. Streams of colorful, organized data flow from the lockbox towards the developer, who is looking on with understanding. The background is a clean, modern workspace with soft, ambient lighting. Small, stylized icons representing different LLMs (like a cloud, a brain, a gear) float gently around the octopus. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, yet calming color palette, emphasizing clarity and helpfulness.
